name: Comparing Spectrogram Front-Ends for Abnormal Heart-Sound Detection with a Convolutional Neural Network

description: arXiv:2607.16220v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Heart disease kills a lot of people, and one cheap way to catch it early is by listening to heart sounds with a stethoscope, or better yet, just recording them and running them through a model. This project is a binary classification task: take a short clip of someones heartbeat and decide if it sounds normal or abnormal. Instead of trying out a...
author: Abhinav Pala, Dhanush Pala
